title: US-Iran talks in Switzerland postponed as fighting in Lebanon intensifies
summary_full: The White House says Vice-President JD Vance will not travel to Switzerland on Friday for a new round of direct talks with Iran.
summary_public: The White House says Vice-President JD Vance will not travel to Switzerland on Friday for a new round of direct talks with Iran.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: US-Iran talks in Switzerland postponed as fighting in Lebanon intensifies
